content.en:
"Alright, I'll send you out, you take a scale from me, activate the power of the scale, and you can get out of this seabed, and then go back to the place where you came first. After that, I will urge the force in the air and force a gap open, and you will take the opportunity to get out. "

Vicky said.

Although Ye Tian didn't care about this replica body, the raccoon blood wanted to send him out, if he didn't go out, it would arouse the suspicion of the raccoon blood.

After all, no primary-level immeasurable lifeform innocently gave up a clone after having a clone, that was too abnormal.

Click!

Ye Tian pulled out a scale from the blood, and suddenly the power on the scale was stimulated, forming a special fluctuation, which could actually resist the power of the seal here, allowing Ye Tian to exert enough strength.

Obviously, the blood has been sealed here for endless years, and it is not that he has not realized anything, at least he knows more about the seal, and has some research.

Soon.

Ye Tian left from this sealing void and returned to the outside world.

......

As soon as he came out, Ye Tian immediately sealed the entrance, not allowing any Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestor or Supreme Enhancement Substance Level to break into this place, so as not to have any accidents.

Truncate the skytower.

Dongchen Dao Ancestor and the others came here, and asked Ye Tian about the situation of the crack, after all, the crack was too big, and the fluctuations caused were not small, and they naturally all knew about the existence of the crack.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, what the hell is on the other end of the rift?"

Dongchen Daozu asked.

Ye Tian didn't hide it, and said directly: "That section is a sealed void, even if I enter there, I will be directly sealed with ninety percent of my strength." And what was sealed there was a high-level immeasurable life form, and the entire truncated Black Mountain existed to seal him. He wanted me to release him, but I refused for fear of danger. From now on, no Dao Ancestor will be allowed to enter there. "

"Higher-Order Immeasurable Lifeform !!!"

When Dongchen Daozu heard this, they were immediately shocked.

They are only the first-level immeasurable lifeforms, and the middle-level immeasurable lifeforms are all invincible existences for them, let alone high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

That kind of existence can easily destroy a group of primary-level immeasurable lifeforms, far beyond their imagination!

Such beings are sealed here!

Soon after, the other forces gradually learned about the sealing of a high-level immeasurable lifeform, but they didn't dare to enter there, otherwise they wouldn't be able to get out after entering!

The same is true for those who cut off the forbidden area, even if they know the information, they don't dare to enter there.

Not only that, but they didn't dare to destroy and cut off the Black Mountain, otherwise the seal would be completely broken, and that terrifying high-level immeasurable lifeform would come out, and that would be a disaster!

But no one knew about Ye Tian's cooperation and trading with the high-level immeasurable lifeform Blood, and Ye Tian didn't reveal it.

......

Genki Territory.

Ye Tian's copied body, the Xuanming Great Ancestor, left the True Mountain Domain and went to the True Demon Domain.

The True Demon Territory is different from the True Mountain Territory, the True Demon Territory is a territory dominated by the True Demon Clan, there are no ancient giant cities here, only one tribe, similar to the situation of the Panshan Territory.

However, a terrifying battle broke out in the True Demon Realm a long time ago, so the resources of this piece of heaven and earth are not very rich, and the fighting is very serious.

Moreover, the True Demon Territory is relatively exclusive, and ordinary primary-level immeasurable lifeforms really don't dare to come to the True Demon Domain.

Ye Tian came to the True Demon Domain, naturally because the opportunity left by the blood was somewhere in the True Demon Domain.

Not long after entering the True Demon Realm, Ye Tian found that he was being targeted.

However, the other party did not drive himself.

After all, he didn't do anything, and it was impossible for the other party to make a move.

However, in this case, it is easy to be tracked.

Ye Tian didn't care about this, he flew away directly, and soon came to a place in the True Demon Domain.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian looked at a black mountain peak in front of him and muttered in his heart.

This is the territory of the once bloody Black Sacred Mountain, and this Black Sacred Mountain has a killing array arranged by the bloody and many defensive arrays, even high-level immeasurable lifeforms are difficult to break into here.

Although endless years have passed, the Great Ancestors of the True Demon Realm should not have broken into this place yet.

Ye Tian obtained the information given by the blood, so he knew the formation here very well, and had a way to enter the Black Saint Mountain.

And the treasure land is inside the Black Saint Mountain, and after you only need to enter, you can use the treasure land there to elevate the immeasurable body.

And just when Ye Tian came here, some Great Ancestors also came nearby.

After all, Ye Tian pointed directly at the Black Saint Mountain, which naturally attracted their attention.

At the moment, they are discussing it privately.

"This Great Ancestor is very unfamiliar, not the Great Ancestor of our True Demon Domain, what is he doing when he comes to Black Holy Mountain?"

"The Black Saint Mountain is the residence of the legendary Raccoon Blood Ancestor, but the Raccoon Blood Ancestor has been missing for endless years, and may have fallen long ago, but he must have left good things in the Black Saint Mountain, but it's a pity that we can't break into the Black Saint Mountain!"

"Could it be that this strange Great Ancestor has a way to enter the Black Saint Mountain?"

"It's impossible, if there was really a way to enter the Black Saint Mountain, the Great Ancestor would have already entered, and it would be his turn?"

"Watch it, if he really has a way to enter, then catch him and ask for a way to enter!"

At this moment, Ye Tian directly entered the Black Saint Mountain range.

Airplanes!!!!

A formation emerged, trying to stop Ye Tian.

However, as soon as Ye Tian waved his hand, a wave of fluctuations emerged, directly canceling out the power of the formation, allowing him to easily pass through the formation.

Layers of formations were broken, and Ye Tian's figure quickly disappeared.

Whew!!!

A great ancestor appeared, revealing an incredible look.

"He can really enter the Black Sacred Mountain!"

"We can't get in, we can only wait for him to come out, block this place, and once he makes a move, do it immediately!"

......

Black Sacred Mountain.

Ye Tian stepped here, and immediately followed the instructions of the blood of the fox, and came to a silver-white river in the Black Holy Mountain.

"Yinguang River, the energy here can refine the immeasurable body, even the superior immeasurable body will be quickly refined, and it will be useful before the immeasurable body reaches the realm of Xiaocheng!"

He was going to use this Silver Light River to raise the Infinite Body to the Xiaocheng realm, and in that case, his strength would be terrifyingly enhanced.

Of course, in addition to this, the Black Saint Mountain also has other treasure lands, and some treasure lands can enhance his immeasurable will and immeasurable path.
